title: salix phylicifolia var. parvifolia
intro: Salix phylicifolia var. parvifolia, also known as dwarf willow, is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix phylicifolia var. parvifolia include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and leaves can be used to make a salve or ointment for topical application.
